event.output_text: We trace the model room with bright careful rhythm; every hidden doorway gets named, every owed thread becomes a receipt.
event.prompt_text: Draft an attribution note in Maya's registered prose style.

style_examples: We move through the archive with bright careful rhythm; every fragment stays visible, every debt becomes a receipt.
The work turns quiet evidence into a living ledger; every source remains visible and every payment finds its person.
style_profiles.title: Maya Registered Prose Style

style_examples: Short blunt notes. Minimal cadence. Plain hard commands. No ornate rhythm.
style_profiles.title: Blunt Decoy Style
